visa_types.name: Study/ Training
visa_types.documents_required:
Travel medical insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, Click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/vnm/en/swe/travel-insurance)
Whole required documents will be submitted on the submitting day. Please refer to the documents listed in the checklist below. The Embassy reserves the right to ask for further documentation if needed.
CHECKLIST – Study-Training
To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.
Schengen Visa Application Form in English
Schengen Visa Application Form in Swedish
The forms must be completed either in Swedish or in English. Documents issued by the authorities in your country of origin are to be submitted together with a translation in Swedish or English by an authorized translator and then legalized.

Important Note:
- All documents must be in A4 paper. Passport copy must be in portrait orientation to ensure scanning quality.
- NO staples, pins.
- All documents in other language than Swedish or English without mark must be translated into in an official language of the embassy at Notary Office.
- All documents in in other language than Swedish or English mark on checklist, must be recent, maximum three (3) months old, need to be translated an official language of the embassy at Notary Office. The documents and the translation must be legalised.
Applicants from other countries can apply at VFS Global Vietnam if you can show that you are residing legally in Vietnam.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[Table: Study/ Training]
Please note:
- The applicable visa fee in Vietnamese Dong is as per the current exchange rate. The fees need to be paid in cash/cards and are subject to change without prior notice.
- In addition to regular visa fee, VFS Global charges EUR 23 (712,000 VND) for service fee
- All fees should be paid in advance and are non-refundable.
- The SMS service is also available at EUR 4 (124,000 VND) per application. This is an optional service.
- Children below 6 years of age are exempted from visa fees for short-stay Schengen visa to Sweden.
- For applicants’ convenience, VFS provides additional services to support applicants in the process of their visa application with VFS. Please “
click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/vnm/en/swe/premium-services)
 
” for more details.
visa_types.processing_time: It is advisable to submit applications well in advance before the intended journey. However, you cannot apply for a visa more than six months in advance. And for seafarers in the performance of their duties, applications shall be lodged no more than nine months in advance.
visa_types.forms: If you wish to apply for a Swedish Visa, you can download the Visa Application Form here.  (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/vnm/en/swe/visa-type#business)
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Study/ Training visa is granted for those who aim to visit Sweden for studying or training (less than 90 days).
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Study/ Training visa is granted for those who aim to visit Sweden for studying or training (less than 90 days).

## Visa Fees

[Table: Study/ Training]
Please note:
- The applicable visa fee in Vietnamese Dong is as per the current exchange rate. The fees need to be paid in cash/cards and are subject to change without prior notice.
- In addition to regular visa fee, VFS Global charges EUR 23 (712,000 VND) for service fee
- All fees should be paid in advance and are non-refundable.
- The SMS service is also available at EUR 4 (124,000 VND) per application. This is an optional service.
- Children below 6 years of age are exempted from visa fees for short-stay Schengen visa to Sweden.
- For applicants’ convenience, VFS provides additional services to support applicants in the process of their visa application with VFS. Please “
click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/vnm/en/swe/premium-services)
 
” for more details.

## Documents Required
Travel medical insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, Click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/vnm/en/swe/travel-insurance)
Whole required documents will be submitted on the submitting day. Please refer to the documents listed in the checklist below. The Embassy reserves the right to ask for further documentation if needed.
CHECKLIST – Study-Training
To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.
Schengen Visa Application Form in English
Schengen Visa Application Form in Swedish
The forms must be completed either in Swedish or in English. Documents issued by the authorities in your country of origin are to be submitted together with a translation in Swedish or English by an authorized translator and then legalized.

Important Note:
- All documents must be in A4 paper. Passport copy must be in portrait orientation to ensure scanning quality.
- NO staples, pins.
- All documents in other language than Swedish or English without mark must be translated into in an official language of the embassy at Notary Office.
- All documents in in other language than Swedish or English mark on checklist, must be recent, maximum three (3) months old, need to be translated an official language of the embassy at Notary Office. The documents and the translation must be legalised.
Applicants from other countries can apply at VFS Global Vietnam if you can show that you are residing legally in Vietnam.

## Photo Specifications
- No more than 6-months old
- 35-40mm in width
- Taken against a light background
- Close up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70 -80% of the photograph
- In sharp focus and clear Of high quality with no ink marks or creases

## Processing Time
It is advisable to submit applications well in advance before the intended journey. However, you cannot apply for a visa more than six months in advance. And for seafarers in the performance of their duties, applications shall be lodged no more than nine months in advance.

## Short stay
For short stay visa, a decision to your visa application will normally be available within 15 working days. In individual cases, this period may be extended up to a maximum of 45 days.
It is strongly recommended that applicants should submit applications well in advance before the intended journey, but not more than 6 months in prior to intended date of departure to avoid any inconvenience.

## Download Forms
If you wish to apply for a Swedish Visa, you can download the Visa Application Form here.  (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/vnm/en/swe/visa-type#business)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa is solely for the purpose of undertaking journeys by  members of official delegations who, following an official invitation, participate in meetings, consultations, negotiations
                                                                        or exchange programs, as well as events held in Sweden by intergovernmental organizations.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa is solely for the purpose of undertaking journeys by  members of official delegations who, following an official invitation, participate in meetings, consultations, negotiations
                                                                        or exchange programs, as well as events held in Sweden by intergovernmental organizations.

## Visa Fees

[Table: Official Visit/Delegation]

## Documents Required
Travel medical insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, Click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/vnm/en/swe/travel-insurance)
Whole required documents will be submitted on the submitting day. Please refer to the documents listed in the checklist below. The Embassy reserves the right to ask for further documentation if needed.
Checklist-Official Visit/Delegation
To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.
Schengen Visa Application Form in English
Schengen Visa Application Form in Swedish
The forms must be completed either in Swedish or in English. Documents issued by the authorities in your country of origin are to be submitted together with a translation in Swedish or English by an authorized translator and then legalized.

Important Note:
- All documents must be in A4 paper. Passport copy must be in portrait orientation to ensure scanning quality.
- NO staples, pins.
- All documents in other language than Swedish or English without mark must be translated into in an official language of the embassy at Notary Office.
- All documents in in other language than Swedish or English mark on checklist, must be recent, maximum three (3) months old, need to be translated an official language of the embassy at Notary Office. The documents and the translation must be legalised.
Applicants from other countries can apply at VFS Global Vietnam if you can show that you are residing legally in Vietnam.

## Photo Specifications
- No more than 6-months old
- 35-40mm in width
- Taken against a light background
- Close up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70 -80% of the photograph
- In sharp focus and clear Of high quality with no ink marks or creases

## Processing Time
It is advisable to submit applications well in advance before the intended journey. However, you cannot apply for a visa more than six months in advance. And for seafarers in the performance of their duties, applications shall be lodged no more than nine months in advance.

## Short stay
For short stay visa, a decision to your visa application will normally be available within 15 working days. In individual cases, this period may be extended up to a maximum of 45 days.
It is strongly recommended that applicants should submit applications well in advance before the intended journey, but not more than 6 months in prior to intended date of departure to avoid any inconvenience.

## Download Forms
If you wish to apply for a Swedish Visa, you can download the Visa Application Form here.  (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/vnm/en/swe/visa-type#business)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Tourist visa is granted for those where the intention is to visit Sweden for tourism and sightseeing without having an invitation from a Swedish referent.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Tourist visa is granted for those where the intention is to visit Sweden for tourism and sightseeing without having an invitation from a Swedish referent.

## Visa Fees

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa is provided for those who are visiting their family, friends or relatives in Sweden. You also need to submit documents concerning the relative or friend you plan to visit in
                                                                        Sweden
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa is provided for those who are visiting their family, friends or relatives in Sweden. You also need to submit documents concerning the relative or friend you plan to visit in
                                                                        Sweden

## Visa Fees

[Table: Visiting Family And Friends]

## Documents Required

visa_types.overview:
Overview
A business visa is granted for those who are visiting Sweden for business or conference meetings.
Applicants who are applying for the purpose of Sports or cultural visit can apply for Business visa as well
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview

Applicants who are applying for the purpose of Sports or cultural visit can apply for Business visa as well

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Transit visa is granted for those who intend to transit through Sweden.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Transit visa is granted for those who intend to transit through Sweden.

## Visa Fees

[Table: Transit]
Please note:
- The applicable visa fee in Vietnamese Dong is as per the current exchange rate. The fees need to be paid in cash/cards and are subject to change without prior notice.
- In addition to regular visa fee, VFS Global charges EUR 23 (712,000 VND) for service fee
- All fees should be paid in advance and are non-refundable.
- The SMS service is also available at EUR 4 (124,000 VND) per application. This is an optional service.
- Children below 6 years of age are exempted from visa fees for short-stay Schengen visa to Sweden.
- For applicants’ convenience, VFS provides additional services to support applicants in the process of their visa application with VFS. Please “
click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/vnm/en/swe/premium-services)
 
” for more details.

## Documents Required

## 
Travel medical insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, Click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/vnm/en/swe/travel-insurance)
Whole required documents will be submitted on the submitting day. Please refer to the documents listed in the checklist below. The Embassy reserves the right to ask for further documentation if needed.
CHECKLIST – Transit 
To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.
Schengen Visa Application Form in English
Schengen Visa Application Form in Swedish
The forms must be completed either in Swedish or in English. Documents issued by the authorities in your country of origin are to be submitted together with a translation in Swedish or English by an authorized translator and then legalized.

Important Note:
- All documents must be in A4 paper. Passport copy must be in portrait orientation to ensure scanning quality.
- NO staples, pins.
- All documents in other language than Swedish or English without mark must be translated into in an official language of the embassy at Notary Office.
- All documents in in other language than Swedish or English mark on checklist, must be recent, maximum three (3) months old, need to be translated an official language of the embassy at Notary Office. The documents and the translation must be legalised.
Applicants from other countries can apply at VFS Global Vietnam if you can show that you are residing legally in Vietnam.

## Photo Specifications
- No more than 6-months old
- 35-40mm in width
- Taken against a light background
- Close up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70 -80% of the photograph
- In sharp focus and clear Of high quality with no ink marks or creases

## Processing Time
It is advisable to submit applications well in advance before the intended journey. However, you cannot apply for a visa more than six months in advance. And for seafarers in the performance of their duties, applications shall be lodged no more than nine months in advance.

## Short stay
For short stay visa, a decision to your visa application will normally be available within 15 working days. In individual cases, this period may be extended up to a maximum of 45 days.
It is strongly recommended that applicants should submit applications well in advance before the intended journey, but not more than 6 months in prior to intended date of departure to avoid any inconvenience.

## Download Forms
If you wish to apply for a Swedish Visa, you can download the Visa Application Form here.  (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/vnm/en/swe/visa-type#business)
